offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We optimize routes instead of manual route planning using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient routing leads to delayed deliveries and increased fuel costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage on Indie Hackers about routing challenges
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try manual route input and basic optimization algorithm on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
